languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, у меня срочное извещение. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус покинул борт флагмана, нарушив все возможные протоколы отбытия. Учитывая обстоятельства, обнаружение этого факта расценено как крайне подозрительное событие. Мастер дисциплины уже инициировала внутреннее расследование на этот счет".

"Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, у меня срочное извещение. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус покинул борт флагмана, нарушив все возможные протоколы отбытия. Учитывая обстоятельства, обнаружение этого факта расценено как крайне подозрительное событие. Мастер дисциплины уже инициировала внутреннее расследование на этот счет".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eo-gann Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

"Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eo-gann Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

"Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eo-gann Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

languages.text: 「艦長、緊急報告です。ジェネトール・エクストレミス・イオガン・フェブルスが、全ての離艦手順を無視して旗艦を離艦しました。この状況を鑑みれば、彼の行動は極めて疑わしいものと判断されます。武器長は既に内部調査を開始しています」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、緊急報告です。ジェネトール・エクストレミス・イオ・ガン・フェブルスが、全ての離艦手順を無視して旗艦を離艦しました。この状況を鑑みれば、彼の行動は極めて疑わしいものと判断されます。武器長は既に内部調査を開始しています。」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, tengo un informe urgente. El Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs ha abandonado la nave insignia, infringiendo todos los protocolos de desembarco. Dadas las circunstancias, es más que sospechoso. La maestra de armas ya ha abierto una investigación interna sobre la situación».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, tengo un informe urgente. El Genetor Extremis Eo-gann Februs ha abandonado la nave insignia, infringiendo todos los protocolos de desembarco. Dadas las circunstancias, es más que sospechoso. La maestra de armas ya ha abierto una investigación interna sobre la situación».

languages.text: "Lord Captain, ich habe einen dringenden Bericht für Euch. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs hat gegen sämtliche Abmusterungsprotokolle verstoßen und das Flaggschiff verlassen. Angesichts der Umstände ist sein Handeln ausgesprochen verdächtig. Die Waffenmeisterin hat bereits eine interne Untersuchung der Angelegenheit befohlen."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, ich habe einen dringenden Bericht für Euch. Genetor Extremis Eo-gann Februs hat gegen sämtliche Abmusterungsprotokolle verstoßen und das Flaggschiff verlassen. Angesichts der Umstände ist sein Handeln ausgesprochen verdächtig. Die Waffenmeisterin hat bereits eine interne Untersuchung der Angelegenheit befohlen."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je viens de recevoir un rapport urgent. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs a quitté le vaisseau après avoir enfreint tous les protocoles de débarquement. Au vu des circonstances, ses actions sont pour le moins suspectes. La capitaine d'armes a d'ores et déjà ouvert une enquête interne. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, je viens de recevoir un rapport urgent. Le genetor extremis Eo-gann Februs a quitté le vaisseau après avoir enfreint tous les protocoles de débarquement. Au vu des circonstances, ses actions sont pour le moins suspectes. La capitaine d'armes a d'ores et déjà ouvert une enquête interne. »

languages.text: “舰长大人，紧急报告。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯在严重违反所有离舰规程的情况下，离开了旗舰。在当前情势下做出该行为极其可疑。戒律大师已就此展开内部调查。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，紧急报告。特级基因士埃欧-甘·费布鲁斯在严重违反所有离舰规程的情况下，离开了旗舰。在当前情势下做出该行为极其可疑。戒律大师已就此展开内部调查。”

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, acil bir raporum var. Genetör Ekstremis Eogunn Februs, gemiden ayrılma protokollerini ihlal ederek sancak gemisini terk etti. Mevcut koşullar altında eylemleri, son derece şüpheli olarak değerlendirilmeli. Silahtar, bu konuda çoktan bir iç soruşturma başlattı."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have an urgent report. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has left the flagship after breaching all disembarkation protocols. Under the circumstances, his actions must be considered highly suspect. The Master-at-Arms has already opened an internal investigation into the matter."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, acil bir raporum var. Genetör Ekstremis Eo-gann Februs, gemiden ayrılma protokollerini ihlal ederek sancak gemisini terk etti. Mevcut koşullar altında eylemleri, son derece şüpheli olarak değerlendirilmeli. Silahtar, bu konuda çoktan bir iç soruşturma başlattı."
